data.body: Decision (per scope): implemented the genuine end-to-end path (not the reframe). CLI block captures the created id via $(rebar create ... | tail -1) and threads the SAME ticket through init->create->ready->claim->close; no jq needed (plain create prints the id as its last stdout line). Verified the block runs end-to-end in a throwaway git repo. MCP block reframed in prose as server config (not implying an operation). This is the runnable block sibling 0435 extracts+executes in CI.
